query_title: The Death and Life of Marsha P. Johnson

recommendations.title: Dick Johnson Is Dead

recommendations.title: The Remarkable Life of Ibelin
recommendations.overview: The secret life of a young World of Warcraft gamer is vividly reimagined when his online friends contact his family after his death.

recommendations.title: Chief of Station
recommendations.overview: After learning that the death of his wife was not an accident, a former CIA Station Chief is forced back into the espionage underworld, teaming up with an adversary to unravel a conspiracy that challenges everything he thought he knew.

recommendations.title: The Mystery of Marilyn Monroe: The Unheard Tapes
recommendations.overview: This documentary explores the mystery surrounding the death of movie icon Marilyn Monroe through previously unheard interviews with her inner circle.

recommendations.title: Avengement
recommendations.overview: While on a prison furlough, a lowly criminal evades his guards and returns to his old stomping ground to take revenge on the people who turned him into a cold blooded killer.

recommendations.title: Debt Collectors
recommendations.overview: A pair of debt collectors are thrust into an explosively dangerous situation, chasing down various lowlifes while also evading a vengeful kingpin.

recommendations.title: Requiem for the American Dream

recommendations.director: Kelly Nyks, Peter D. Hutchison, Jared P. Scott

recommendations.title: The Life of David Gale
recommendations.overview: A man against capital punishment is accused of murdering a fellow activist and is sent to death row.

recommendations.title: One Ranger
recommendations.overview: A Texas Ranger is recruited by British Intelligence to track down a dangerous terrorist and stop him from attacking London.

recommendations.title: All Eyez on Me
